'''Feenicks VI''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim's]] [[Feenicks system/Legends|Feenicks system]].

==History==
During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], the local [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[System Patrol Squadron]] base and its [[CR92a Assassin-class corvette|''Assassin''-class corvettes]] was destroyed by [[Red Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Red Squadron's]] [[A/SF-01 B-wing starfighter/Legends|B-wing starfighters]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Tour of Duty: B-Wing]]'' {{1st}}
